buildName: GLOBAL DATA LOGIC SYNC + DASHBOARD FIX
features: Added shared dashboard/report/proof metric helpers for consistent cross-page counts
Fixed Dispatch Dashboard Proof Waiting Review count to match Proof Review Needs Review
Fixed Dispatch Dashboard Priority Queue proof count to stop counting published/locked proof as waiting review
Fixed Client Dashboard Recent Reports to use the same normalized report source as Client Reports
Recent Reports now shows report title, property name, address, proof count, and published time
Fixed Client Dashboard Recent Activity workflow statuses so accepted/started/uploaded/completed events no longer all show Completed
